Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd" -S "tcp:ferrexpresshn.database.windows.net,1433" -U "FerrAdmin" -P "ferrex#press2024" -d "FerrexpressHN" -Q "SELECT id_subcategory, id_subcategory2, Types, Size, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM Products GROUP BY id_subcategory, id_subcategory2, Types, Size ORDER BY id_subcategory, id_subcategory2, Types, Size" -s "|" -W)

Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd" -S tcp:ferrexpresshn.database.windows.net,1433 -U FerrAdmin -P "ferrex#press2024" -d FerrexpressHN -Q "SELECT TOP 30 ID, Codigo, Product, Types, Size, id_subcategory, id_subcategory2 FROM Products WHERE Product LIKE '%tubo%galv%' ORDER BY Product" -s"|" -W)

Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd" -S tcp:ferrexpresshn.database.windows.net,1433 -U FerrAdmin -P "ferrex#press2024" -d FerrexpressHN -Q "SELECT TOP 40 ID, Codigo, Product, Types, Size, id_subcategory, id_subcategory2 FROM Products WHERE Product LIKE '%PVC%' ORDER BY Types, Size" -s"|" -W)

Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd" -S tcp:ferrexpresshn.database.windows.net,1433 -U FerrAdmin -P "ferrex#press2024" -d FerrexpressHN -Q "SELECT TOP 20 ID, Codigo, Product, Types, Size, id_subcategory, id_subcategory2 FROM Products WHERE id_subcategory = 9 ORDER BY Types, Size" -s"|" -W)

Bash("/c/Program Files/Microsoft SQL Server/Client SDK/ODBC/170/Tools/Binn/sqlcmd" -S tcp:ferrexpresshn.database.windows.net,1433 -U FerrAdmin -P "ferrex#press2024" -d FerrexpressHN -Q "SELECT DISTINCT Types, COUNT\(*\) as Cnt FROM Products GROUP BY Types ORDER BY Cnt DESC" -s"|" -W)
